sigma.title: Communication To LocaltoNet Tunneling Service Initiated - Linux
Communication To Ngrok Tunneling Service - Linux
Network Connection Initiated To AzureWebsites.NET By Non-Browser Process
New Connection Initiated To Potential Dead Drop Resolver Domain
Suspicious Non-Browser Network Communication With Google API
Communication To LocaltoNet Tunneling Service Initiated
Process Initiated Network Connection To Ngrok Domain
Communication To Ngrok Tunneling Service Initiated

osquery.name: t1102_c2_sockets
osquery.query_text: SELECT p.pid, p.name, p.path, p.cmdline, s.remote_address, s.remote_port, s.state FROM process_open_sockets s JOIN processes p ON s.pid = p.pid WHERE s.remote_address != '' AND s.remote_address != '127.0.0.1' AND s.remote_address != '::1' AND s.state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1102_dns_cache
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, fd, socket, remote_address, remote_port FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port = 53 LIMIT 50;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 11 direct run(s), 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
